text.title: Agent Customer-Zero Pilot Protocol Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying agent-customer-zero-pilot-protocol must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

forbidden.pattern: No pilot >12 weeks without explicit re-scoping decision.
No success criteria defined after pilot start.
No kill switch verified later than day 0.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key (slug, id, name) before serialising.
Round numeric values to 2 decimal places when serialising.

example.note: Missing the first required field and `forbidden_seen` is non-empty — schema rejects both.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
